steps.title: Use the area formula
steps.content:
The area of a circle is $A=\pi r^2$. Since the radius is $2.3$, substitute $r=2.3$.
$$
A=\pi(2.3)^2
$$

steps.title: Find the coefficient
steps.content: Square the radius. $$ (2.3)^2=5.29 $$ So the area is $5.29\pi$, which means $b=5.29$. The answer is 5.29.
